register.title: Join MoodDic
register.subtitle: Build your mood streak today
register.success: Registration successful! Check your email to verify your account.
register.privacyPolicy: I accept the terms and privacy policy
register.errorFields: Please fill in all fields correctly.
register.privacyPolicyError: You must accept the privacy policy.

login.errorFields: Please fill in all fields correctly.
login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in and keep your streak alive

home.questToday: Daily quest: log how you feel across life's little arenas.
home.doneToday: Nice — today's check-in is done. Come back tomorrow for streak XP!
home.noAverage: Log a few entries to see your weekly pulse.
home.aiTeaser: MoodDic Plus/Pro unlocks deeper AI pattern analysis — open Profile → Subscription.
home.aiUnlocked: Plus/Pro is active — AI analysis (placeholder) is unlocked.

history.title: History
history.emptyBody: Your check-ins will show up here with XP earned. Long-press an entry to delete it.
history.deleteBody: This removes the mood check-in permanently.

mood-note.title: Check-in
mood-note.successBody: Your mood map is saved. Keep the streak going tomorrow.
mood-note.incompleteBody: Pick a score and — if needed — a short note (min. {{min}} characters).
mood-note.aspectNotePlaceholder: e.g. what shaped this for you…
mood-note.overallNotePlaceholder: How are you feeling mentally and emotionally?
mood-note.whyRequired: No history yet, score differs from your average, or the last ~1.5 weeks dropped — add context.
mood-note.dropBanner: Heads up: your ~1.5-week average dropped noticeably. Notes are required.

overall.title: Mental health — overall feel?
overall.hint: This is your general mental-health check. Pick a face and add a short note.

summary.title: Recap
summary.hint: Review your scores, then claim XP.

duties.title: Duties & responsibilities
duties.hint: What you have to handle and how that feels.

environment.title: Environment
environment.hint: Home, place, noise, comfort around you.

profile.title: Profile
profile.nameInvalid: Name must be at least 2 characters.
profile.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out?
profile.dailyNotificationsHint: Notification at 20:00 to protect your check-in streak.
profile.notificationsDenied: Notifications permission denied — enable it in system settings.
profile.plusTeaser: Plus/Pro unlocks AI insights and pattern reports. Demo payment is in the app.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.demoHint: Mock checkout — looks real, does not charge a real card. Cards ending in 0000 are declined.

app.error: Something went wrong. Please contact support.

registration.success: Registration successful! Please check your email to verify your account.

login.failed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.

first_name.length: First name must be between 2 and 50 characters.

password.length: Password must be at least 6 characters long.

privacy_policy.not_accepted: You must accept the privacy policy.
